option.name: filePath
option.value: /Musique (snapshot).java

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-form-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.EvenementArtisteFormController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<Label fx:id="formTitleLabel" styleClass="page-title-small" text="Ajouter un evenement" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle-small" text="Renseignez les details" />
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Titre *" /> <TextField fx:id="titreField" promptText="Titre" styleClass="artist-form-field" /> </VBox> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Type *" /> <ComboBox fx:id="typeComboBox" styleClass="artist-form-combo" /> </VBox> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Date debut *" /> <TextField fx:id="dateDebutField" promptText="dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm" styleClass="artist-form-field" /> </VBox> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Date fin *" /> <TextField fx:id="dateFinField" promptText="dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm" styleClass="artist-form-field" /> </VBox> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Capacite max" /> <TextField fx:id="capaciteField" promptText="Ex: 120" styleClass="artist-form-field" /> </VBox> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Prix ticket" /> <TextField fx:id="prixField" promptText="Ex: 25.0" styleClass="artist-form-field" /> </VBox> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Galerie *" /> <ComboBox fx:id="galerieComboBox" styleClass="artist-form-combo" /> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0"> <Label text="Image de couverture" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onChooseImageClick" styleClass="artist-secondary-button" text="Choisir image" /> <Label fx:id="imageFileLabel" styleClass="page-subtitle-small" text="Aucun fichier choisi" wrapText="true" /> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Description" /> <TextArea fx:id="descriptionArea" prefRowCount="4" promptText="Description" styleClass="artist-form-text-area" wrapText="true" /> </VBox>
<Label fx:id="validationErrorLabel" managed="false" styleClass="artist-form-error" visible="false" wrapText="true" />
<HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" spacing="8.0"> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onCancelClick" prefWidth="120.0" styleClass="artist-secondary-button" text="Fermer" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSaveClick" prefWidth="120.0" styleClass="artist-primary-button" text="Enregistrer" /> </HBox> </VBox>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-card page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.EvenementsArtisteController"> <padding><Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /></padding> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <Label styleClass="page-title-small" text="Mes evenements" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Ajouter" /> </HBox> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle-small" text="Structure prete: liste des evenements + actions Annuler/Editer/Supprimer." wrapText="true" /> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-card page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.EvenementsArtisteController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <Label styleClass="page-title-small" text="Mes evenements" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button fx:id="addEvenementButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onAddEvenementClick" styleClass="artist-primary-button" text="Ajouter" /> </HBox>
<Label styleClass="page-subtitle-small" text="Gerez vos evenements et leur statut." wrapText="true" />
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <TextField fx:id="rechercheField" promptText="Rechercher evenement..." styleClass="artist-form-field" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label text="Trier par" /> <ComboBox fx:id="triComboBox" prefWidth="220.0" styleClass="artist-form-combo" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="emptyStateLabel" managed="false" styleClass="page-subtitle-small" text="Aucun evenement trouve." visible="false" />
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="artist-events-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <VBox fx:id="eventsListContainer" spacing="10.0" styleClass="artist-events-list"> <padding> <Insets bottom="2.0" left="2.0" right="2.0" top="2.0" /> </padding> </VBox> </ScrollPane> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14.0" styleClass="artist-event-card" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.EvenementArtisteCardController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="10.0" right="10.0" top="10.0" /> </padding>
<ImageView fx:id="coverImageView" fitHeight="84.0" fitWidth="120.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true" styleClass="artist-event-image" />
<VBox spacing="5.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label fx:id="titreLabel" styleClass="artist-event-title" text="Titre evenement" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="dateTypeLabel" styleClass="artist-event-meta" text="14/04/2026 17:04 | Concert" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="statusMetaLabel" styleClass="artist-event-meta" text="Statut: A venir | Places: 0" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="descriptionLabel" styleClass="artist-event-desc" text="Description evenement" wrapText="true" /> </VBox>
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" />
<HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" spacing="8.0"> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onEditClick" styleClass="artist-secondary-button" text="Editer" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onDeleteClick" styleClass="artist-danger-button" text="Supprimer" /> </HBox> </HBox>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
